steps: Flop checks to UTG who has initiative
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Demo 001.
reaction_text: Smart tempo. Keep pressing on l2 core rules check.

steps: BTN 3-bets small, SB folds, BB folds
Action returns to CO who now lacks initiative
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Demo 002.
reaction_text: Nice composure. Keep pressing on l2 core rules check.

steps: Flop BB checks OOP, BTN keeps initiative
BTN checks back to control pot
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Demo 003.
reaction_text: Steady read. Keep pressing on l2 core rules check.
